{{Expand}}

{{Infobox character
| name = Gold dreadbeasts
| aliases = Truegold dreadbeasts
| species = Dreadbeast
| appears_in = Cradle
| introduced = [[Wintersteel (novel)|Wintersteel]]
}}

== Wintersteel ==
<div class="wv-facts mw-collapsible mw-collapsed"><div class="wv-facts-head mw-collapsible-toggle">Sourced facts <span class="wv-facts-count">2</span></div>
<ul class="wv-fact-list mw-collapsible-content">
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Gold dreadbeasts]] are attacking a fortress.<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10">''Wintersteel'', chapter 10</ref>}}</li>
<li>{{spoiler|book=cradle-08-wintersteel|[[Truegold]] [[dreadbeasts]] can be sliced in half by an [[Archlord]] [[flying sword]].<ref name="cradle-08-wintersteel-c10" />}}</li>
</ul></div>

== Notes ==
<references />

{{Cradle nav}}

[[Category:Characters]]
[[Category:Wintersteel]]
[[Category:Cradle]]
[[Category:Cradle characters]]
[[Category:Dreadbeasts]]
